name: @ryu/activity-app
description: The Ryu Activity app: the unified chronological feed of everything a node emits (monitor alerts, quests, approvals, meetings, runs, notes), grouped by day, newest first, shipped as a full-page Companion (Path B, ui_format:"html"). Read-only view over Core's /api/activity through the activity:read bridge capability; built to one self-contained HTML via vite-plugin-singlefile. Consumes @ryu/ui components (tree-shaken into the single-file bundle).
